verdict: BA spec iter2 PASS. All five OBJ-1..OBJ-5 objections from iter1 are resolved. Independent file reads confirm: (1) test_AC4 is 82 lines with is_negation_explanation boolean loop — no pure 'is None' assertion pattern and no ..HEAD negative-assertion gap; (2) test_AC3 has exactly 3 assertions and zero occurrences of files_created_provenance_violation; (3) agents/qa.md line 432 confirms the target label is present. The sole remaining dev work — one additive assertion to test_AC3 — is correctly scoped. No blockers.
